title: 9 Inch Kitchen Tongs,Cooking Tongs Stainless Steel Non Stick Barbecue Tongs for Salad,BBQ,Serving,Buffet,Ice,Frying Tongs Utensils Cooking Food
features: 【Easy to clean】Mirror polished.Easy to wash and safe to clean in your dishwasher.It looks like new after washing.
【High-quality】Made of best non-toxic 304 stainless steel that will never rust or corrode. No extra accessories, not easy to damage and very durable.

【Unique Design】Unique design of the 3 lines gap,can help you to filter out the water from the salad and can filter out the oil from the roast meat and other fried foods.It adopt ergonomic design,mirror polished but not slippery at all,easy control and pick things, allow one hand use.

【Durable and Firm】With size of 9” the tongs are the most versatile and best for all-around cooking and serving for most people. The thickness of clamp is 1mm, which is well made and provides a strong grip with heavy duty capacity.

【Multiple uses】Great for taking vegetable, food, sweet , pasta,meat, cheese, bread, ice and more, lightweight and convenient, easy to carry at any place, great for various outdoor activities kitchen things and tools.
description: Product Description Features: Ergonomic design handle, easy to grip Easy to control and pick things Easy to store, save space Perfect for outdoor barbeque or grilling in the kitchen.Works well for turning and lifting appetizer cheese,fish,crab,chicken,burger,vegetable salad,ice block,pastry,cake,and etc. DURABLE METERIAL Made of 304 stainless steel material with anti-corrosion/anti-heat,resist rusting and tarnishing features,which allows the gripper to withstand high temperature,they're designed to be durable and long-lasting utensil. SAFETY AND EASY USE 3 lines gap design can help you to filter out the water from the salad and can filter out the oil from the roast meat and other fried foods. Tips: Please wash the tongs with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process; Please clean and air dry the tongs after using for your healthy daily use, and store them in dry place for its durability.
